segments.text: Floating straight up and it looks like it could connect at this percent, but they're gonna keep playing neutral for now.
segments.original_text: 空へ真上に浮いて雷が決まりそうなパーセントでしたが一旦ここは展開継続

segments.text: Oh, it goes flying in the direction they're facing!
segments.original_text: あー向いてる方向に飛んでいく

full_text: Floating straight up and it looks like it could connect at this percent, but they're gonna keep playing neutral for now. It's not that. Oh I see. Oh, it goes flying in the direction they're facing!
corrections: 隠れそうな→決まりそうな (likely to land/kill, Pichu's Thunder)
